vocab.example: What is the salary range for this position?
vocab.example_vi: Mức lương cho vị trí này là bao nhiêu?

vocab.example: Our company offers health insurance as a benefit.
vocab.example_vi: Công ty chúng tôi có bảo hiểm sức khỏe như một phúc lợi.

vocab.example: Is it okay to negotiate the salary during the interview?
vocab.example_vi: Có ổn không nếu tôi đàm phán lương trong buổi phỏng vấn?

vocab.example: We pay a yearly bonus based on performance.
vocab.example_vi: Chúng tôi trả thưởng hàng năm dựa trên hiệu suất làm việc.

vocab.example: I received the offer letter this morning.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi nhận được thư mời làm việc sáng nay.

vocab.example: The probation period is two months in our company.
vocab.example_vi: Thời gian thử việc ở công ty chúng tôi là hai tháng.

vocab.example: Health insurance starts from your first day of work.
vocab.example_vi: Bảo hiểm sức khỏe bắt đầu từ ngày đầu tiên đi làm.

vocab.example: What salary do you expect for this role?
vocab.example_vi: Bạn kỳ vọng mức lương bao nhiêu cho vị trí này?

lines.speaker: Hoa (HR)
lines.text: Hi Nam, congratulations! We would like to send you the offer letter.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: Thank you so much. Can you tell me about the salary and benefits first?

lines.speaker: Hoa (HR)
lines.text: Of course. The salary is fifteen million dong per month, plus a yearly bonus.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: I see. Is it possible to negotiate a little on the salary?

lines.speaker: Hoa (HR)
lines.text: What salary do you expect for this role?

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: Based on my experience, I was hoping for around seventeen million.

lines.speaker: Hoa (HR)
lines.text: Let me check with the manager. We can also add health insurance from day one.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: That sounds good. What about the probation period?

lines.speaker: Hoa (HR)
lines.text: It is two months, with full salary during that time.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: Great, thank you for explaining everything so clearly.

questions.q: What does Nam want to negotiate?
What benefit does Hoa mention besides bonus?
How long is the probation period?

shadowing: We would like to send you the offer letter this afternoon.
Can you tell me about the salary and benefits for this role?
Is it possible to negotiate a little on the salary amount?
We can also add health insurance starting from your very first day.
The probation period is two months, with full salary during that time.

interview.question: What salary do you expect for this position?
tips_vi: Đưa ra một khoảng lương thay vì một con số cố định
Nêu căn cứ: kinh nghiệm, mức thị trường, khảo sát trước
Thể hiện sự linh hoạt, sẵn sàng trao đổi thêm
interview.sample_answer: Based on my experience and some research on the market rate for this role, I would expect a salary between fifteen and eighteen million dong per month, depending on the final job description. However, I am also very interested in the full package, including the yearly bonus, health insurance, and other benefits, not just the base salary alone. I am flexible and open to discussing this further, depending on the exact responsibilities of the role and the opportunities for growth at your company over the next few years. If the benefits are strong, I am also willing to be flexible on the number itself, because long-term growth matters more to me than a slightly higher starting salary.

interview.question: What benefits are most important to you when choosing a job?
tips_vi: Nêu 2-3 phúc lợi cụ thể, tránh liệt kê quá dài
Kết nối phúc lợi với nhu cầu thực tế của bạn (sức khỏe, học tập, cân bằng cuộc sống)
Tránh chỉ nói về lương — nên đề cập yếu tố phát triển
interview.sample_answer: For me, health insurance is very important, because it gives me peace of mind for myself and my family, especially if something unexpected happens. I also value opportunities for learning, like training courses, certification support, or conference budgets, because I want to keep improving my technical skills every year. Finally, I think flexible working hours are important, since they help me balance my work and my personal life, especially now that I have more family responsibilities. Of course, salary and yearly bonus also matter a lot, and I won't pretend they don't, but these other benefits really affect my long-term happiness and motivation at a job. A company that invests in its people usually keeps me longer than one that only offers a high salary.
